MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Nitza Waksman is present.
Attorney Shauna Matlin appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Summerlynn Danner-Rivera, Alberta Rivera and Cheyenne Rivers all present.
Attorney Dmitri Pickman representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of June - 25 -2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
